_session_note: Fitness formula finalized. Sim harness running on Termux. Core P+H+C dynamics confirmed working. All constants below confirmed by simulation.

overview.name: Ecosystem CCG
overview.target_platform: Termux (terminal) now, egui Android APK later
overview.status: active — sim dynamics confirmed, ready to apply to game biome.rs
overview.repo_note: Code lives in Claude outputs, not in this repo. KB tracks design only.

architecture.separation_rule: ui.rs is the ONLY file with stdin/stdout. All other modules are pure logic.

module_roles.types.rs: All data types, constants, trait system, card types, intention phase types. Zero I/O.
module_roles.cards.rs: All card definitions and deck builders. Zero I/O.
module_roles.biome.rs: World state: land slots, active biomes, placed organisms, fitness resolution, biome contests, world effect application. Zero I/O.
module_roles.player.rs: Three separate decks, two hands, discard/graveyard zones, elimination logic. Zero I/O.
module_roles.game.rs: Turn loop, human action API, win/loss conditions. No direct I/O.
module_roles.ui.rs: All terminal input/output. Replace with egui when porting to Android.

sim_harness.location: sim_test/ — standalone Rust binary, runs on Termux
sim_harness.config: sim.toml — edit organism and land stats without recompile
features: verbose log toggle in main.rs (uncomment log lines)
food pool options A/B/C toggle by comment in biomeS.rs

food_pool_options.A: current pop, no fitness scaling — cliff-edge collapse
food_pool_options.C: last-turn fitness scaling — gradual signal, tighter feedback

sim_harness.note: biomeS.rs is sim version of biome.rs. Game biome.rs needs all sim fixes applied before next playtest.

confirmed_dynamics.P1_H1_growth: Both grow together. H outpaces P slightly. Natural equilibrium P6 H5 (oscillates between P4H4 and P5H5 due to threshold=0.9).
confirmed_dynamics.collapse_threshold: P4 H6 → extinction. P5 H6 → survives at lower pops. Tipping point between P4 and P5.
confirmed_dynamics.carnivore_window: Safe carnivore entry: H2-H4. Too early (H1) → kills herbivore. Too late (H5+) → collapse already underway.
confirmed_dynamics.carnivore_effect: C1 at P3 H4 stabilizes system. Without carnivore → eventual extinction.
confirmed_dynamics.design_goal_met: Boom-bust confirmed. Carnivore stabilization confirmed. Reaction window P2H2 to P3H4.

components.deficit_term: product((f - critical) / (1.0 - critical)) for all f < 1.0 — scales surplus down as deficits worsen
components.below_product: product(f) for all f < 1.0 — directly multiplies fitness down

fitness_system.rationale: Surplus cannot compensate for deficits. Two strong deficits = death. deficit_term reduces surplus contribution, below_product reduces base fitness.
fitness_system.critical_check: Any single factor below FITNESS_CRITICAL_NEED short-circuits → returns FITNESS_AUTO_DOWNGRADE * 0.5

thresholds.note: upgrade_if_best == downgrade_if_worst = 0.9 — no stable zone, dynamic oscillation only. auto_upgrade for multi-species thriving scenarios.

fitness_system.food_pool_timing: Uses last_population (Option B) — one-turn delay creates reaction window. last_population snapshot taken at start of resolve().

resource_factor.rationale: Caps surplus so no single resource masks deficits. Old log2 let water surplus compensate food scarcity.

sunlight.mechanic: tolerance_factor(supply, sun_need, 999.0) — threshold not abundance. Meeting need = 1.0, below = sqrt falloff.
sunlight.shading: available_light -= sum(territory * pop) * SHADE_K per size group, largest first

minerals.mechanic: resource_factor(share, mineral_need). share = (reach / total_reach) * minerals. Per-individual, population cancels. Competition is reach-based.
minerals.note: total_reach = sum(reach * pop) so high-pop species dominates competition

water.mechanic: resource_factor(share, water_need * pop). Competitive, shared proportionally.

food.mechanic: resource_factor(share, food_need * pop). Pool = sum(prod_last_pop * multiplier). One-turn delay via last_population.
food.carnivore: prey_value = size * pop (herb/omni) or * 0.5 (carnivore). Divided by total_carn_pop for per-individual share.

food_pressure.applied_as: pressure_factor = 1/(1 + food_pressure + trampling). Factor in calc_fitness_producer.

trampling.formula: sum over herbivores: max(0, herb_size - prod_size) * herb_territory_need * herb_pop * PRESSURE_K2
trampling.rationale: Size differential — large herbivores trample small producers. Large producers immune to small herbivores. Scales with absolute herbivore numbers.
trampling.per_producer: Each producer card experiences its own trampling based on its size vs each herbivore

sparsity.effect: Reduces effective food_need for both herbivore food received and pressure on producer symmetrically
sparsity.rationale: At low densities organisms have difficulty finding each other — reduces both feeding efficiency and trampling impact
sparsity.cutoff: No effect when herb_pop * prod_pop >= SPARSITY_K (= 9)

predation_system.hunt_limit: carnivore.size * hunt_multiplier — prey must be STRICTLY LESS THAN
predation_system.prey_value: size * pop for herb/omni, * CARNIVORE_NUTRITION_FACTOR (0.5) for carnivore prey
predation_system.competition_fix: total_prey_value / total_carn_pop — each individual competes for share
predation_system.applied_as: factor in calc_fitness_animal — enters both deficit_term and below_product

constants.note: PRESSURE_K2 and carnivore food_need not yet tested with full 3-species sim at POP_MAX=6

omnivore.note: mali vs herbivore: +0.3 territory, +0.3 food_need. NOT YET SIMULATED.

carnivore.food_need: NOT FINALIZED — basic stabilization confirmed, value not locked

Update game types.rs constants to confirmed values
cargo build game and fix compile errors
